title: Atlas Expansion VIII: Domains 616-645 (Probability & Statistics)

D616.name: Measure-theoretic probability (Kolmogorov axioms)
D616.reason: Probability measure: real-valued on σ-algebra = EML-2

D617.name: Central limit theorem (CLT)
D617.reason: σ√n convergence rate: real measurement = EML-2

D618.name: Large deviations (Cramér, Sanov)
D618.reason: P(Sn/n > a) ~ exp(-nI(a)): EML-1 rate function

D620.name: Stochastic differential equations (SDE)
D620.reason: dX = f dt + g dW: real diffusion = EML-2

D622.name: Percolation theory
D622.reason: Phase transition at p_c; critical behavior non-constructive = EML-∞

D623.name: Random walk theory
D623.reason: Return probability; Green's function = EML-2 real

D625.name: Renewal theory
D625.reason: Renewal measure U(t): EML-1 (exp moments of inter-arrival)

D628.name: Free probability (Voiculescu free CLT)
D628.reason: R-transform; free convolution = EML-3 complex analytic

D629.name: Determinantal point processes
D629.reason: Correlation kernel K(x,y): complex analytic = EML-3

D630.name: Schramm-Loewner evolution (SLE)
D630.reason: Loewner equation; complex analytic trace = EML-3

D631.name: Maximum likelihood estimation (MLE)
D631.reason: ℓ(θ) = Σ log p(x_i;θ): log-likelihood = EML-1

D632.name: Bayesian inference
D632.reason: log posterior: EML-1; posterior ∝ prior × likelihood

D633.name: Hypothesis testing (Neyman-Pearson)
D633.reason: p-value; type I/II error rates = EML-2 real

D634.name: Minimax estimation
D634.reason: Risk function; minimax = real optimization = EML-2

D636.name: Bootstrap and resampling
D636.reason: Empirical distribution; CI bounds = EML-2 real

D637.name: Gaussian processes (GP regression)
D637.reason: Kernel k(x,x'): covariance = EML-2 real measurement

D640.name: Information geometry (Fisher-Rao)
D640.reason: Fisher information metric: real Riemannian = EML-2

D642.name: Statistical learning theory (VC dimension)
D642.reason: VC dim = combinatorial; generalization bound = EML-2

D643.name: Sparse recovery (LASSO, compressed sensing)
D643.reason: L1 minimization; RIP condition = EML-2 real

verdicts.probability: Large deviations: EML-1; Brownian/martingales: EML-2; SLE/RMT: EML-3
verdicts.statistics: MLE/Bayes: EML-1 (log-likelihood); most stats: EML-2; high-dim: EML-3

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 8 (T147, S427): 30 probability/statistics domains. Large deviations: EML-1 (exp(-nI(a)) rate function). Brownian motion, SDE, martingales: EML-2 (real Gaussian). SLE, RMT, DPP: EML-3 (complex analytic kernels). MLE, Bayes, concentration inequalities: EML-1 (log-likelihood). Most statistics: EML-2 (real measurements). 0 violations. Total domains: 655.
rabbit_hole_log: Large deviations: EML-1 (rate function); Cramér theorem is EML-1
SLE: EML-3 (Loewner equation = complex analytic); Tracy-Widom: EML-3
MLE/Bayes: EML-1 (log-likelihood structure); Bayesian = log posterior = EML-1
Percolation phase transition: EML-∞ (non-constructive critical behavior)
NEW: T147 Atlas Batch 8 — 30 domains, 0 violations, total 655
